titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hamdan Ibn Al-Husayn
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hamdan Ibn Al-Husayn

segments: ه عن حمدان بن الحسين فقد رويته عن عليّ بن حاتم إجازة قال: أخبرنا القاسم بن محمّد قال: حدّثنا حمدان بن الحسين‌.
arabic.text: ه عن حمدان بن الحسين فقد رويته عن عليّ بن حاتم إجازة قال: أخبرنا القاسم بن محمّد قال: حدّثنا حمدان بن الحسين‌.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Hamdan ibn Al-Husayn, I have narrated it from Ali ibn Hatim by authorization, who said: Al-Qasim ibn Muhammad informed us, who said: Hamdan ibn Al-Husayn narrated to us.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Hamdan ibn Al-Husayn, I have narrated it from Ali ibn Hatim by authorization, who said: Al-Qasim ibn Muhammad informed us, who said: Hamdan ibn Al-Husayn narrated to us.
